steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively emphasizes when and where Argentum debuted. The two key details are the year (2018) and the location (New York City, New York). The correct choice must make both details prominent, not buried or omitted.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — As is common of Grimanesa Amorós's sculptures, the iridescent multicolored LED domes of *Argentum* cut an imposing 253-cubic-foot figure when the piece debuted.: Mentions the debut but gives no year and no location. The focus is on the sculpture's materials and size. ✗
  • Choice B — Artist Grimanesa Amorós often works with light in her sculptures, which tend to be large in scale.: A general description of Amorós's style. No debut date, no location, no mention of *Argentum* debuting at all. ✗
  • Choice C — In 2018, Grimanesa Amorós debuted *Argentum* in New York City, New York.: Opens with the year (2018) and ends with the location (New York City, New York) — both details are front-and-center. ✓
  • Choice D — Grimanesa Amorós is a Peruvian American artist who often works with LED light in her large-scale sculptures, such as *Argentum* (2018).: The year appears only as a parenthetical detail; there is no location. Neither detail is meaningfully emphasized. ✗
That is the correct answer.
